statement: Engineering knowledge: Apply mathematics, science, and fundamentals
Problem analysis: Identify, formulate, and analyze complex problems
Design solutions for complex engineering problems
Modern tool usage: Create and apply appropriate techniques
Engineer and society: Apply contextual reasoning
Environment and sustainability: Understand impact of solutions
Ethics: Apply ethical principles and professional responsibility
Individual and team work: Function effectively in teams
Communication: Communicate effectively on complex activities
Life-long learning: Engage in continuous learning
